blockers.description: Platform is in mid-startup state — containers running but opencti is 'health: starting', connector-mitre not yet started, ollama and chromadb unhealthy
blockers.workaround: Re-run 'docker compose --profile platform up -d' after fresh session start; containers may have restarted or need re-check

human_actions_pending.context: OpenCTI healthcheck was fixed (commit 9f4936b) — changed curl -f to grep-based check. Should become healthy within 60s of that fix being applied.

human_actions_pending.context: This is Plan 01-04 Task 3 checkpoint. Also check http://localhost:8080 browser for ATT&CK techniques.

decisions.rationale: OpenCTI /health returns {status:unauthorized} (HTTP 401) on healthy startup — curl -f treats 401 as failure

decisions.decision: Fixed Ollama healthcheck: curl -f -> grep -q models
Fixed ChromaDB healthcheck: curl -f -> grep -q nanosecond

next_action: Check 'docker compose --profile platform ps' — if opencti is healthy, run ./scripts/init-models.sh then ./scripts/verify-platform.sh. If platform stopped, run 'docker compose --profile platform up -d' first.
context_notes: Phase 1 execution is 75% done. Plans 01-01 through 01-03 have committed SUMMARYs. Plan 01-04 is at the integration verification checkpoint — the platform is starting up. The only remaining work is: wait for healthy, pull models, verify, write SUMMARY, then gsd-verifier runs. On resume, run /gsd-execute-phase 1 after typing 'phase-1-complete' to trigger phase verification.
